source.note: CoPainter never produces alpha=255; max observed ~254 across the ZIP. Pixel content preserved as-is — no thresholding or recolour applied during staging.

anchor_derivation.method: manual visual — CoPainter ZIP has no origin metadata; anchor derived from See-through topwear/legwear bbox overlap
anchor_derivation.scale_basis: CoPainter jacket width 269px maps to See-through topwear width 191px -> scale 0.7100

do_not: modify pixel content (the bbox crop is byte-identical to source)
promote to assets/puppet/layers/ until separate explicit task
rebake the alpha to force 255 — keep CoPainter's native semi-alpha edges
